_authority: OWNER 2026-05-01 directive + DL-038 Seven Binding Backtest Rules + DL-054 anti-theater pass criteria
_purpose: Canonical tester defaults for V5 pipeline runs. Pipeline-Operator MUST load these on every tester launch. Set-files MAY override per-EA values but MUST cite a per-EA ADR.
_origin_evidence: Tester journal 2026-05-01 11:40Z showed 'initial deposit 10000.00 USD' — wrong by factor 10x. OWNER had stated the 100k/1000 decision multiple times but it was never codified to disk. This file is that codification.
leverage_note: Matches tester journal default (1:100). OWNER override authoritative if changed.

pre_screen.purpose: Fast real-tick trade/profit sanity check before launching the canonical full P2 run.

full_run.timeout_basis: Sized from the six-month pre-screen runtime with deterministic-run and headroom multipliers.

anti_theater_gates.min_trade_count_exception: Per-symbol zero-trade ADR with named cause (e.g. broker-blocked window). 'no history data, stop testing' is NEVER a valid zero-trade outcome — it is a setup failure.
